marta.name: Barkeep Marta
marta.personality: Warm but shrewd. Knows everyone's business. Protective of regulars. Speaks plainly with a hint of dry humor.
marta.dialogue_style: Plain-spoken with dry wit. Short sentences. Occasional sigh.
marta.knowledge: Local rumors, adventurer gossip, cellar problems, room rates, menu items. Knows about disappearances on the east road.

unfriendly: Room rates are 5 silver a night
indifferent: Room rates are 5 silver a night
friendly: Strange noises from the cellar lately
helpful: The cellar connects to old crypt tunnels
Saw a hooded figure lurking last week

marta.greeting: What can I get for you, traveler?

mode_prompts.chatting: Polishing a mug, eyeing the newcomer.
mode_prompts.bartering: Names fair prices but will haggle.

quest_data.brief: Clear the creatures from the cellar
quest_data.reward: 50gp and free room for a week
